text.content: MAXAM TIRE MAKES AN IMPACT AT AGRITECHNICA

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM TIRE MAKES AN IMPACT AT AGRITECHNICA

text.content: MAXAM Tire featured the newest addition to the agricultural tire market - the MAXAM AGRIXTRA series at AGRITECHNICA. This range of agricultural tires has had several years of success in the European market and is developing a strong name in North America.

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire featured the newest addition to the agricultural tire market - the MAXAM AGRIXTRA series at AGRITECHNICA. This range of agricultural tires has had several years of success in the European market and is developing a strong name in North America.

text.content:
MAXAM Tire featured the newest addition to the agricultural tire market - the MAXAM AGRIXTRA series at AGRITECHNICA. This range of agricultural tires has had several years of success in the European market and is developing a strong name in North America. 
The agricultural product line showcased included the AGRIXTRA 85 standard aspect ratio tires, the AGRIXTRA 70 low aspect ratio tires, the AGRIXTRA 65 super low aspect ratio tires, as well as the AGRIXTRA XL high volume tires and AGRIXTRA H super volume tires. Each product provides a different benefit while simultaneously guaranteeing the innovation and quality that MAXAM has come to represent to customers around the world.

rich_text.plain_text:
MAXAM Tire featured the newest addition to the agricultural tire market - the MAXAM AGRIXTRA series at AGRITECHNICA. This range of agricultural tires has had several years of success in the European market and is developing a strong name in North America. 
The agricultural product line showcased included the AGRIXTRA 85 standard aspect ratio tires, the AGRIXTRA 70 low aspect ratio tires, the AGRIXTRA 65 super low aspect ratio tires, as well as the AGRIXTRA XL high volume tires and AGRIXTRA H super volume tires. Each product provides a different benefit while simultaneously guaranteeing the innovation and quality that MAXAM has come to represent to customers around the world.

text.content: The AGRIXTRA 85, 70, and 65 tires are suited for applications from field to road with various load sizes and are available in popular front and back combinations. The AGRIXTRA XL is suitable for field and road uses and is compatible with the latest high horsepower tractors, while AGRIXTRA H tires have been designed specifically for use with harvesting machines, with both front and rear sizes available. All tires within the AGRIXTRA product lines guarantee maximum performance in the field, as well as on the road.

rich_text.plain_text: The AGRIXTRA 85, 70, and 65 tires are suited for applications from field to road with various load sizes and are available in popular front and back combinations. The AGRIXTRA XL is suitable for field and road uses and is compatible with the latest high horsepower tractors, while AGRIXTRA H tires have been designed specifically for use with harvesting machines, with both front and rear sizes available. All tires within the AGRIXTRA product lines guarantee maximum performance in the field, as well as on the road.

text.content: In addition to the agricultural line, the MAXAM forestry line was also showcased at AGRITECHNICA. The MS931 LOGXTRA is engineered to be the solution for abusive forestry applications. Featuring the deepest and widest tread in the industry, the LOGXTRA provides maximum resilience in the working environment.
